backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the portfolio backend with user profiles, artwork CRUD, image blob storage (logo, cover, portrait), and text content management, all protected by role-based access control via authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three tracked features: fixing the AdminLogin stuck state, updating the hero tagline, and replacing the dynamic QR code with a static Instagram image, each mapped to files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, providing one- to two-sentence descriptions of each component, hook, page, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, destructive, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio SPA, mounting the React app at the `#root` div and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app configuring TanStack Router with three routes (`/`, `/admin-login`, `/admin`) and wrapping the app in a React Query provider; the portfolio page includes all sections including the new QRSection.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static about section displaying Mudit Sharma's artist portrait, bio text, decorative corner accents, a floating experience badge, and a stats row with years, projects, and satisfaction metrics.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Responsive 4-column gallery that fetches artworks from the backend, renders them as hover-effect cards with skeleton loading states, and opens a lightbox dialog on click; hidden when no artworks exist.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with location, WhatsApp, and Instagram cards, plus a CTA card linking to WhatsApp for project inquiries.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Displays a list of five featured mural projects by mapping over a static PROJECTS array and rendering each via the ProjectSection component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, and a hidden double-click easter egg that navigates to the admin login page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dynamic cover image and text content fetched via custom hooks, plus WhatsApp CTA and portfolio scroll buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-spy active section highlighting, mobile menu toggle, WhatsApp CTA, and a double-click logo easter egg for admin login.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable article component that renders a single project with a large image (70%) and a text panel (30%), supporting optional location tag and alternating layout direction.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays a static QR code image linking to the @khudrangkalakaar Instagram profile, with a direct link fallback.
Renders a responsive grid section listing seven mural/wall-art services, each displayed as a card with a CheckCircle icon, title, and description.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Renders a 'Why Clients Trust Us' section with a two-column header and a grid of six trust-point cards, each showing a numbered accent, icon, title, and description.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity state persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including logo, cover image, artist portrait, text content, and artworks via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view by comparing scroll position against each section's offsetTop, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins font, configures Tailwind layers, defines CSS custom properties for the design system (terracotta palette, borders, etc.), and adds utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that validates hardcoded credentials, triggers Internet Identity authentication, assigns an admin role via the backend actor, and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: React admin panel page that allows authenticated admins to manage artworks, site images (logo, cover, portrait), and text content via tabbed UI. Redirects unauthenticated or non-admin users to the login page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including Poppins font, OKLCH-based color tokens (terracotta, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, known issues (admin panel login bug), and three existing feature requests: fixing admin login flow, updating the hero tagline, and replacing the dynamic QR code with a static Instagram QR image.
